candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating profit, but it is a consolidated total and not specifically labelled as COGS/cost of sales. Since selected COGS bucket is only 'Raw material and merchandise', this row is not clearly a COGS-specific D&A amount and assigning it to COGS could misclassify or double count.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A row exists, but the excerpt does not indicate whether any portion belongs to COGS versus SG&A. Conservative treatment is not to add it to COGS without clearer bucket attribution.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating profit and excluded from the selected XSGA component rows, but it is a consolidated total rather than an SG&A-specific D&A row. Because it is not labelled as admin/selling/R&D/SG&A, assigning the full amount to XSGA would be uncertain.

variables.notes: R:c. The statement shows one standalone operating D&A total, but no SG&A-specific or R&D-specific D&A breakout. Since XRD is empty and the total D&A row is unallocated, conservative output is no separate XSGA_DA selection pending manual review.
